channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Fresh Perspective on Drug Gangs Controlling San Francisco Streets
Trump Rejects Notion That Iran Conflict Contradicts His Anti-War Stance
item.description: President Trump dismissed claims that the war with Iran violated his repeated 'No new wars' campaign promise.

item.title: Watch: Trump's Heated Interview With Kristen Welker Ends in Walkout
Trump Backs Warsh to Set Rates as He Sees Fit
item.description: In a Sunday interview, President Trump endorsed Fed Chair Kevin Warsh and reiterated his push for lower interest rates.
